exclusions.reason: Runtime audit stream entries are not desired-state configuration objects.
Ad-hoc command runs are runtime execution records.
Host metrics are runtime telemetry and not managed desired-state configuration.
AWX instances represent runtime cluster topology and are not managed by this provider.
Inventory updates are runtime job records.
Job objects are runtime execution records.
Project updates are runtime job records.
Receptor addresses are runtime transport data.
System job templates are runtime/operator endpoints not in managed desired-state scope.
System jobs are runtime execution records.
Workflow approvals are runtime workflow execution records.
Workflow jobs are runtime execution records.
Workflow job nodes are runtime execution records.
